title: Happy Farm Friends Coloring Page
description: A fun coloring page featuring friendly farm animals that helps children learn about different animals found on a farm while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. You can use the suggested colors or choose your own!

content.image: A simple farm scene with four main animals: a cow standing in a grassy field, a pig by a mud puddle, a chicken near a feed bowl, and a sheep by a fence. There's also a small barn in the background.

elements.name: Cow
elements.description: The cow has spots and is standing in the field. Cows are often black and white or brown.

elements.name: Pig
elements.description: The pig is near a mud puddle. Pigs are often pink or light brown.

elements.name: Chicken
elements.description: The chicken is pecking near a feed bowl. Chickens can be brown, white, or red.

elements.name: Sheep
elements.description: The sheep is standing by a fence. Sheep are usually white or cream colored.

elements.name: Barn
elements.description: The barn is in the background. Barns are often red with a brown or black roof.

elements.name: Grass
elements.description: The grass covers the ground. Grass is usually green.

elements.name: Sky
elements.description: The sky is at the top of the page. The sky is usually blue.

learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink or use to make cheese and butter.
Pigs are very smart animals and like to roll in mud to stay cool.
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat for breakfast.
Sheep grow wool that can be used to make warm clothes like sweaters.
